description: Languages, telepathy, voice, and social influence for reaching others across any barrier.
powers: Tongues
Every language becomes the wielder's own. Foreign words arrive already translated, as natural as breathing.
Voice Thief
Any voice once heard can be perfectly reproduced. The mimicry is flawless, down to the breath between words.
Silver Tongue
Words land with unusual weight on a chosen subject. Persuasion comes easily when the item lends its influence.
Liar's Mask
Falsehoods sound like gospel truth. The wielder's lies carry the weight and warmth of honest conviction.
Mind Mark
Messages pressed into an object linger like ghosts. Touch the same surface later and the words resurface.
Thundervoice
The wielder's words carry impossibly far. A whisper becomes a declaration that reaches distant ears.
Inner Voice
The item speaks directly into the wielder's mind. Its counsel arrives as thought, private and unheard by others.
Vocal Shift
The wielder's voice becomes anything. Deep as a cavern, light as a child, alien and unrecognizable.
Swift Letter
Written words vanish from the page and reappear before their intended reader, no matter the distance.
Oath Grip
A handshake becomes a binding truth. Lies wither in the clasped hands and only honesty survives.
Living Script
Written words reshape themselves for any reader. Each sees the text in their own tongue, clear and fluent.
Binding Ink
Contracts signed with this item carry weight beyond paper. Breaking the terms invites consequences.
Green Speech
Plants respond to the wielder's words as if they understand. They share what they have witnessed in their slow, patient way.
Spirit Whisper
The dead answer one question. Their voice arrives thin and distant, carrying truths only the departed know.
Beast Charm
A specific kind of animal finds the wielder irresistible. They approach without fear, eager and trusting.
Creature Command
Small animals obey simple instructions. They carry, fetch, scout, and return with earnest loyalty.
Messenger Flock
Birds gather at the wielder's call, ready to carry parcels across any distance with unerring direction.
